title: Flodesk vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or HubSpot?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
